name: Lacy

recommendedSets.label: Endgame
recommendedSets.notes: The sheet also shows a Precision-based route, but the attack shell is the clearest late target.

notes: Lacy is treated across the source sheet as a premium all-purpose unit, so her build aims for both damage and utility consistency.
The source row keeps Effect Hit% in the recommended substat package rather than stripping her down to pure crit stats.
